holdings.infoBox: GSSC is an equity ETF with a total of 1323 individual holdings.

overview.description: The TR Activebeta US Small Cap Equity ETF (GSSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US small-cap stocks. The index equally weights four factor-based sub-indices: value, momentum, quality, and low volatility GSSC was launched on Jun 28, 2017 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
